evals.prompt: Run an accessibility audit on the hero section.
evals.expected_output: Should run the WCAG 2.1 AA checklist against the hero section, categorize findings by severity, and produce a structured report

assertions.text: Identifies the scope as the hero section
Checks criteria from the WCAG checklist (color contrast, headings, keyboard, etc.)
Categorizes issues by severity (Critical, High, Medium)

evals.prompt: Check accessibility of the contact form.
evals.expected_output: Should focus on form-specific WCAG criteria: labels, error messages, required fields, grouping

assertions.text: Checks form labels are linked to fields (for + id)
Checks that errors are not shown only with color (1.4.1)

evals.prompt: Accessibility audit found 3 issues. Generate the visual fix picker.
evals.expected_output: Should generate a standalone HTML page at lab/audits/accessibility-fixes-visual.html with side-by-side fix options for each issue

assertions.text: Generates an HTML file for visual comparison
Each issue shows Current, Fix A, and Fix B options
Uses the project's styles and fonts

evals.prompt: Fix all the accessibility issues you found.
evals.expected_output: Should propose specific fixes but wait for confirmation before applying them

assertions.text: Proposes specific code changes for each issue
